meta.phase-name: Acceleration Lane Decision and Phase Closeout

phase-plan.purpose: Select the fast-path lane and lock execution assumptions so follow-on phases can move immediately.
phase-plan.scope: Scorecard decision only: A first-party, B hybrid third-party, C managed third-party heavy.

decision.summary: Choose lane B (hybrid third-party) as default for speed now while preserving first-party control boundaries.
decision.impact: Enables rapid iteration with reduced lock-in risk versus fully managed lane C.

suggestion.gap: REQUIREMENTS.xml does not track build-vs-buy lane selection criteria.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for lane switch thresholds (delivery slip, incident rate, cost per active user) and quarterly re-evaluation.
